When a Stranger Calls (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,860,214Details
International Box Office $19,355,221
Worldwide Box Office $67,215,435
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,938,784
Total $13,938,784
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Far away from the site of a gruesome murder, a teenager named Jill Johnson arrives at a luxurious home for a baby-sitting job. With the children fast asleep, she settles in for what she expects to be an ordinary evening. Soon, the ringing of a phone and the frightening words of a sadistic caller turn Jill’s routine experience into a night of terror.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,607,203 (45.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,999 opening theaters/3,004 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $87,390,560

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 3rd, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: May 16th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, released as When a Stranger Calls (2006)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense terror, violence and some language.
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Babysitters
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Davis Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
